title: Change Tenant Move-In Date prior to Signing Tenancy Agreement
objective: To adjust move-in dates in the property management system after approval but before the legal lease is executed.
trigger: Tenant approved for a non-standard date (e.g., Nov 15th).

procedural_steps.instruction: Confirm the tenant's approved move-in date (e.g., Nov 15th).
procedural_steps.note: Internal contact with the accounting/back office (e.g., Brenda) is not required for this specific change.

procedural_steps.instruction: Navigate from the Home page to the specific Prospect record.
Verify if the back office is locked.
procedural_steps.constraint: Changes cannot be made if the back office is locked; only 'light' changes are accessible in this state.

procedural_steps.instruction: Go to the property page and select the 'Pending Applications' section.
Select the unit and set 'Expected Move-In' to the 15th.
procedural_steps.logic_rule: Set the lease date to the 30th of the month, as tenants are responsible for the full month's rent regardless of the specific move-in day.

procedural_steps.instruction: Check application charges and verify phone numbers are correctly displayed.
procedural_steps.warning: System glitch alert: Mobile numbers often fail to sync to the agreement; ensure phone numbers are in 'Home' or 'Office' fields.

procedural_steps.instruction: Launch Rent Café to verify the date has updated to the 15th, then generate the Tenancy Agreement.
sub_tasks: Review prorated rent and payment details.
Review parking and storage locker agreements.

procedural_steps.instruction: Save cleaned documents in the appropriate subfolder for signature preparation.
